anomaly_pattern.description: Multiple failed login attempts from different IP addresses within short timeframe indicating potential brute force attack

severity_guidance: Critical if >50 failed attempts in 30min, High if >20, Medium if >10
explanation_template: Account {principal} experienced {failed_count} failed login attempts from {ip_count} unique IPs in {time_window}. Pattern suggests brute force attack.

anomaly_pattern.description: Login detected from location that is geographically impossible given previous login location and time delta

severity_guidance: High if distance > 1000km and time delta < 2 hours, Medium if distance > 500km
explanation_template: User {principal} logged in from {new_location} only {time_delta} after login from {prev_location}, distance {distance}km apart.

anomaly_pattern.description: User privileges escalated to critical level outside of change management window

severity_guidance: Critical for any escalation to level 5 outside business hours, High during business hours
explanation_template: User {principal} privilege level escalated from {old_level} to {new_level} at {timestamp} outside change management window.

anomaly_pattern.description: Dormant account that has not logged in for extended period suddenly becomes active

severity_guidance: Medium for dormancy > 90 days, High if account was in deprovisioning state
explanation_template: Dormant account {principal} (inactive for {dormancy_days} days) suddenly became active with action {action}.

anomaly_pattern.description: User accessing resources that deviate significantly from established baseline patterns

severity_guidance: Medium if deviation > 2 sigma and new resource is sensitive, High if > 3 sigma, Critical if asset is mission-critical
explanation_template: User {principal} accessed {resource} with deviation {sigma_deviation} sigmas from baseline. Normal access patterns: {baseline_resources}.

anomaly_pattern.description: Role or group membership change not approved through proper change management workflow

severity_guidance: Critical for privileged group changes without approval, High for sensitive group changes
explanation_template: User {principal} {action_type} group/role {group_name} without proper approval workflow.

anomaly_pattern.description: Host establishing unusual number of outbound connections to multiple internal hosts suggesting lateral movement

severity_guidance: Critical if scanning >100 hosts in 1 hour, High if scanning >20 hosts, Medium if >5 hosts
explanation_template: Host {source_ip} initiated {connection_count} outbound connections to {unique_dest_count} unique internal destinations in {time_window}, typical baseline is {baseline_connections}.

anomaly_pattern.description: Sequential port scanning activity detected on network segment

severity_guidance: High for scanning common service ports, Critical if scanning all ports 1-65535
explanation_template: Port scan detected from {source_ip} targeting sequential ports {port_range} on {target_subnet}.

anomaly_pattern.description: Unusually large data exfiltration detected to external IP addresses

severity_guidance: Critical if >1GB to external, High if >100MB, Medium if >10MB and destination is high-risk country
explanation_template: Host {source_ip} transferred {data_volume}MB to external destination {dest_ip} ({dest_country}) in {time_window}, typical transfer is {baseline_volume}MB.

anomaly_pattern.description: DNS queries used as covert channel indicating data exfiltration via DNS tunneling

severity_guidance: High if >10000 DNS queries/hour to single domain, Critical if query size > 255 bytes
explanation_template: Anomalous DNS activity from {source_ip}: {query_count} queries to {unique_domains} unique domains in {time_window}, suggestion of DNS tunneling.

anomaly_pattern.description: Unusual network traffic patterns detected in encrypted tunnels or abnormal protocol usage

severity_guidance: Medium for protocol anomalies, High for unexpected encrypted traffic volumes
explanation_template: Network segment {segment} detected unusual traffic pattern: {pattern_description} at {timestamp}.

anomaly_pattern.description: Application or system logs deliberately tampered with or deleted

severity_guidance: Critical for any evidence of log tampering, immediate escalation required
explanation_template: Application logs for {application} show evidence of tampering: {gap_count} gaps, {deleted_count} deleted entries, detected at {timestamp}.

anomaly_pattern.description: Suspicious gaps in audit logs suggesting potential event suppression or audit evasion

severity_guidance: Critical for any gaps >1 minute, High for >10 second gaps during suspicious activity period
explanation_template: Audit logs for system {system} contain {gap_count} suspicious gaps totaling {gap_duration} minutes during period {time_window}.

anomaly_pattern.description: Unauthorized or undocumented application configuration changes detected

severity_guidance: Critical for security-related config changes without approval, High for unapproved changes to sensitive apps
explanation_template: Unauthorized configuration change detected in {application}: {config_param} changed from {old_value} to {new_value} by {actor}.

anomaly_pattern.description: Unusual spike in application error rates suggesting potential attack or system compromise

severity_guidance: Medium if error rate > 2x baseline, High if > 5x baseline, Critical if error rate > 10x and affects critical service
explanation_template: Application {application} error rate spiked to {error_rate}% (baseline {baseline_rate}%) from {start_time} to {end_time}.

anomaly_pattern.description: Unauthorized access to cloud console detected with suspicious login characteristics

severity_guidance: Critical for console access from suspicious geolocation without MFA, High with MFA, Medium for expected regions
explanation_template: Cloud console access for account {account_id} from {location} with MFA status {mfa_status}. Deviation: {deviation_description}.

anomaly_pattern.description: Spike in cloud resource creation suggesting unauthorized infrastructure deployment

severity_guidance: Critical if >10 resources created in 1 hour outside change window, High if >5 resources, Medium if resource type is non-critical
explanation_template: Cloud resource creation spike: {resource_count} resources created in {time_window} by {principal}, types: {resource_types}.

anomaly_pattern.description: Cloud storage resources inadvertently exposed to public access

severity_guidance: Critical if sensitive data in exposed storage, High for any misconfiguration, Medium if non-sensitive data only
explanation_template: Storage bucket {bucket_name} configured for public access containing {data_classification} data, potentially exposing {asset_count} assets.

anomaly_pattern.description: Cloud API calls and data movement from multiple geographical regions in unusual pattern

severity_guidance: Medium for multi-region activity outside normal patterns, High for restricted regions, Critical for policy violation regions
explanation_template: Cross-region cloud activity detected: {activity_count} API calls across {region_count} regions in {time_window} by {principal}.

anomaly_pattern.description: Cloud API key used inappropriately or from suspicious source indicating potential credential compromise

severity_guidance: Critical for API key use from external sources, High for use outside normal patterns, Medium for dormant key activation
explanation_template: API key {key_id} (age {key_age} days) used by {principal} from {source} making {call_count} calls in {time_window}.
